det_check_template:
proof fn det_endpoint_push(endpoint_ptr: EndpointPtr, pre_endpoint_perm: Tracked<PointsTo<Endpoint>>, t_ptr: ThreadPtr, post1_endpoint_perm: Tracked<PointsTo<Endpoint>>, r1: SLLIndex, post2_endpoint_perm: Tracked<PointsTo<Endpoint>>, r2: SLLIndex)
    requires (pre_endpoint_perm@.is_init()), (pre_endpoint_perm@.addr() == endpoint_ptr), (pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.len() < MAX_NUM_THREADS_PER_ENDPOINT),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.is_init())
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.addr() == endpoint_ptr)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue_state == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue_state)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_threads == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_threads)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_container == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_container)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.wf())
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue@ == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue@.push(t_ptr))
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.len() == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.len() + 1)
            &&& (forall|v:ThreadPtr|
            #![auto]
            pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue@.contains(v) ==> 
                pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.get_node_ref(v) == 
                    post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.get_node_ref(v))
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.get_node_ref(t_ptr) == r1)
            &&& (post1_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.unique())
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.is_init())
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.addr() == endpoint_ptr)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue_state == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue_state)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_threads == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_threads)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_container == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().owning_container)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().rf_counter)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.wf())
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue@ == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue@.push(t_ptr))
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.len() == pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.len() + 1)
            &&& (forall|v:ThreadPtr|
            #![auto]
            pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue@.contains(v) ==> 
                pre_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.get_node_ref(v) == 
                    post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.get_node_ref(v))
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.get_node_ref(t_ptr) == r2)
            &&& (post2_endpoint_perm@.value().queue.unique())
        }) ==> det_endpoint_push_equal(r1, r2, post1_endpoint_perm, post2_endpoint_perm),
{
{ASSUMES}}
